name: The Ashlands
description: A realm of crumbling keeps, whispering forests, and dragon-haunted peaks. The land where every adventurer begins.

name: The Frostreach
description: A frozen expanse beyond the northern peaks. Ancient frost giants, ice-bound ruins, and a cold that thinks.

name: The Emberveil
description: A shattered volcanic archipelago where the earth bleeds fire. Demon cults, elemental lords, and cities built on cooled lava flows.

name: The Voidspire
description: The edge of reality. Floating islands above an endless abyss, where the rules of the world grow thin and ancient horrors stir in the spaces between.
